questions: what plants are easy to grow?
how to grow vegetables at home?
answers: Start gardening by choosing a sunny spot, preparing the soil, and picking easy plants like tomatoes, herbs, or marigolds. Water regularly and be patient!
Gardening shuru korte chaile prothome mati ready koro, sunlight dekhho, and easy plants diye shuru koro. Tulsi, mint, ar tomato diye start korte paro.
For beginners, start small with a few pots. Use good quality soil, ensure proper drainage, and water consistently. Herbs like basil and mint are very forgiving for new gardeners.
Home gardening is rewarding and relaxing. You can grow veggies like spinach, chili, and lettuce even in small spaces. Raised beds and container gardening work great for limited areas.
